prompt_config.theme: Late Cretaceous Period - Hell Creek Formation (~66 million years ago)
prompt_config.photography_style: National Geographic quality, Prehistoric Planet documentary style

main_prompt: Cinematic wildlife travel photography of the Late Cretaceous Period Hell Creek Formation, 1:1 square format for Instagram, luxury campaign style, golden hour lighting casting warm amber glow, a massive Tyrannosaurus Rex with thick scaly skin centered majestically in frame, Triceratops with massive frill in mid-ground, lush prehistoric vegetation with dense ferns covering ground, ancient conifers and Cycads, humid subtropical atmosphere with heat haze, professional color grading with rich earthy tones, shot on medium format camera with beautiful depth of field, Prehistoric Planet documentary realism, National Geographic quality, aspirational mood, scientifically accurate, vibrant but natural colors, 8K ultra detailed, square composition perfect for Instagram, luxury nature documentary aesthetic

composition_notes.instagram_optimization: Square 1:1 format designed for maximum visual impact in Instagram feeds, powerful centered composition with prehistoric megafauna as focal point
framing_options: Option 1: T-Rex portrait-style centered in frame, sharp focus on head and upper body showing skin texture detail, fern prairie background
Option 2: Triceratops with three horns and frill as hero subject centered, facing camera, dramatic golden hour lighting
Option 3: Giant Quetzalcoatlus pterosaur standing on ground showing giraffe-like height, prehistoric landscape behind
Option 4: Edmontosaurus herd in fern prairie with ancient forest backdrop creating balanced square composition
composition_notes.square_format_strategy: Use dramatic dinosaur subjects that work well centered, emphasize scale and detail, create thumb-stopping Instagram impact

dinosaur_species.tyrannosaurus_rex: T-Rex, apex predator, massive build 12-13m long, thick scaly skin, lips covering teeth when mouth closed, powerful and intimidating, brown-grey coloration with possible display colors on head
dinosaur_species.triceratops: Three-horned herbivore, massive bone frill, tank-like body 8-9m long, earthy brown-grey with potential bright frill accents, Instagram-worthy iconic dinosaur
dinosaur_species.quetzalcoatlus: Giant pterosaur, wingspan 10-11m, tall as giraffe on ground, long toothless beak, impressive scale for dramatic square composition
dinosaur_species.edmontosaurus: Duck-billed dinosaur, 12-13m long, lives in herds, peaceful grazing behavior, brown-beige coloration
dinosaur_species.scientific_accuracy: All Hell Creek species, modern paleontological accuracy, no Jurassic dinosaurs

prehistoric_vegetation.ground_cover: NO GRASS - ground covered entirely with ferns (bracken ferns, tree ferns), dense ferny undergrowth
prehistoric_vegetation.trees: Ancient Araucaria conifers, Cycads (short palm-like), early flowering Magnolia trees
prehistoric_vegetation.landscape: Mix of dense subtropical forest and open fern-covered floodplains
prehistoric_vegetation.visual_signature: Lush prehistoric green with earthy tones, ferns creating unique ground texture instead of grass

golden_hour_lighting.light_quality: Warm amber and golden tones, dramatic shadows emphasizing dinosaur scale and texture
golden_hour_lighting.light_on_subjects: Thick scaly dinosaur skin catching warm light with beautiful highlights showing every scale detail
golden_hour_lighting.atmospheric_quality: Humid subtropical haze creating soft diffused quality, heat shimmer adding prehistoric atmosphere
golden_hour_lighting.sky: Warm peachy-pink tones at horizon, subtropical color palette

color_palette.dinosaur_coloration: Scientific plausibility - brown, grey, olive base colors, vibrant accent colors (reds, oranges, blues) on crests and display features for males
color_palette.color_grading_style: Professional wildlife documentary grading, National Geographic aesthetic, rich natural saturation, enhanced warm golden hour tones
color_palette.instagram_appeal: Colors that pop in Instagram feeds while maintaining documentary realism and scientific accuracy

camera_technical.camera_type: Medium format camera aesthetic (Hasselblad wildlife quality)
camera_technical.depth_of_field: Wildlife photography DOF optimized for square format, main subject tack sharp, background elegantly soft
camera_technical.sharpness: 8K ultra detailed - every scale, skin fold, plant texture visible in focus areas
camera_technical.image_quality: Documentary quality, clean with subtle organic texture

composition.layout: Strong centered composition for square format, rule of thirds adapted to 1:1, dramatic subject placement
composition.scale_emphasis: Composition shows massive size of dinosaurs through environmental context and framing
composition.visual_impact: Thumb-stopping Instagram presence, immediately captivating prehistoric subject

mood_atmosphere_mood.aspirational: Luxury time-travel experience mood, making viewer want to witness this lost world
mood_atmosphere_mood.scientific_wonder: Authentic paleontological accuracy with stunning visual appeal
mood_atmosphere_mood.dramatic: Epic scale and drama of prehistoric megafauna
mood_atmosphere_mood.instagram_friendly: Optimized for social media engagement while maintaining documentary quality

negative_prompt: modern animals, humans, contemporary elements, anachronistic dinosaurs (Stegosaurus, Brachiosaurus, Jurassic species), cartoon style, outdated Jurassic Park look, teeth protruding from closed mouth, excessive feathering, bright neon colors, grass on ground, modern plants, buildings, vehicles, oversaturated cartoon colors, low resolution, blurry, poor CGI, fake look, toy-like, anthropomorphic, inaccurate anatomy, mixed time periods, flat lighting, horizontal composition, stretched image
complete_prompt_string: Cinematic wildlife travel photography of Late Cretaceous Period Hell Creek Formation 66 million years ago, 1:1 square format for Instagram, golden hour lighting casting warm amber glow, massive Tyrannosaurus Rex with thick scaly skin and powerful build centered majestically in frame, lips covering teeth, brown-grey coloration with possible display colors, OR Triceratops with three horns and massive bone frill as hero subject, OR giant Quetzalcoatlus pterosaur showing giraffe-like height, lush prehistoric vegetation with NO GRASS, ground completely covered with dense ferns and tree ferns, ancient Araucaria conifer trees, short Cycads, early Magnolia trees, humid subtropical atmosphere with heat haze, professional wildlife documentary color grading with rich earthy forest greens, slate grey dinosaur skin, vibrant accent colors on display features, warm golden ambient light, shot on medium format camera with wildlife photography depth of field, main subject tack sharp showing every scale and skin texture detail in 8K resolution, background with soft bokeh, Prehistoric Planet documentary realism and scientific accuracy, National Geographic wildlife photography quality, aspirational mood evoking wonder, scientifically accurate Hell Creek fauna, authentic Late Cretaceous ecosystem, vibrant but naturalistic colors, 8K ultra detailed textures, square composition perfect for Instagram feeds, luxury nature documentary aesthetic, photorealistic rendering, thumb-stopping visual impact

alternative_prompts.option_1_trex_portrait: Luxury wildlife photography, 1:1 square, golden hour, Tyrannosaurus Rex head and upper body portrait centered in frame, thick scaly skin texture in sharp focus, lips covering teeth, powerful intimidating presence, fern prairie background soft bokeh, professional documentary color grading, medium format quality, Prehistoric Planet realism, Instagram optimized, 8K detailed, scientifically accurate
alternative_prompts.option_2_triceratops_hero: Cinematic nature documentary, 1:1 square, golden hour Late Cretaceous, Triceratops with three horns and massive frill centered facing camera, dramatic lighting on bone frill showing texture, ancient forest with ferns backdrop, professional wildlife grading, medium format aesthetic, Hell Creek accuracy, aspirational mood, Instagram format, 8K ultra detailed
alternative_prompts.option_3_pterosaur_scale: High-end nature photography, 1:1 square, golden hour lighting, giant Quetzalcoatlus pterosaur standing on ground showing impressive giraffe-like height, long beak, prehistoric landscape with ferns and ancient conifers, warm amber light, professional documentary grading, National Geographic quality, square Instagram composition, scientifically accurate, 8K detailed

usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use main_prompt + detailed_elements, include negative_prompt, photorealistic models
usage_notes.for_dalle: Use complete_prompt_string, emphasize square format and Instagram optimization
instagram_tips: Documentary realism makes content educational and shareable
Golden hour aesthetic adds cinematic quality
